title: release gate wait for checks
outOfScope: Application source code, non-workflow tests, release metadata, Makefile, CI workflows other than release.yml, and GitHub release/tag creation outside this Work Item.

sources.reason: The failed release run checked required workflows before compatibility had completed.
Workflow behavior requires regression coverage for waiting and failure handling.
Repository workflow requires successful exact-SHA checks before release publication.

riskAssessment.reason: The release gate must wait for exact-SHA required workflows without weakening their success requirement.

executionDecision.reason: The task scope, evidence, acceptance, scenarios, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the gate waits for exact-SHA required workflow completion and fails closed on failure or timeout.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.yml waits until smoke.yml and compatibility.yml for SOURCE_COMMIT finish before evaluating their conclusions.
The release gate publishes only when both exact-SHA workflows conclude success; failure and timeout stop publication.
tests/test_workflows.py verifies the wait loop, success condition, and fail-closed behavior.
The release workflow remains strict for tag identity, exact source SHA, and post-release smoke dispatch.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The release workflow can evaluate the exact-SHA prerequisite before the compatibility workflow has completed, causing a valid release attempt to fail prematurely.
constraints: Do not bypass or downgrade required workflow checks.
Preserve exact source SHA and tag validation.
Keep the change limited to release workflow logic and its regression tests.
intent.rationale: Waiting for terminal conclusions makes the gate deterministic while preserving the existing fail-closed publication policy.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: smoke and compatibility are still running for the exact source SHA
both exact-SHA required workflows finish successfully
a required workflow fails or does not complete before timeout

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly confirmed continuation after reviewing the release gate timing failure and approved the workflow adjustment.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
